channel.title: Zyrox
channel.description: Practical PC hardware guides, build advice, and troubleshooting articles.

item.title: Best Motherboard for RTX 4070: What Matters Most
item.description: Choose the best motherboard for an RTX 4070 build by focusing on connectivity, power delivery, and upgrade flexibility.

item.title: Best Monitor for Work and Gaming: What to Choose
item.description: Learn how to pick the best monitor for work and gaming by balancing refresh rate, panel quality, and ergonomic value. Here is my honest experience and what you actually need.

item.title: How to Fix High CPU Usage on Windows
item.description: A practical guide to diagnosing and fixing high CPU usage on Windows with steps that target background apps, drivers, and system settings.

item.title: Best RAM for Ryzen 7000: Speed, Latency, and Capacity
item.description: Learn how to choose the best RAM for Ryzen 7000 builds by focusing on capacity, timing, and real-world performance. Review the benchmark data to make an informed decision.

item.title: Best GPU for 1440p Gaming: What to Buy in 2026
item.description: Find the best GPU for 1440p gaming in 2026 with a practical guide to performance, value, and upgrade balance. 1440p is the baseline for high-refresh-rate gaming.

item.title: What Is the Best Motherboard for Ryzen 7 7800X3D?
item.description: Find the best motherboard for Ryzen 7 7800X3D by balancing chipset features, VRM quality, connectivity, and value.

item.title: How to Fix Windows Update Problems in 2026
item.description: Follow a practical step-by-step guide to fix Windows update problems, from storage checks to reset tools and service troubleshooting.

item.title: Best PSU for RTX 5080: How to Choose a Safe and Reliable Power Supply
item.description: Learn how to pick the best PSU for an RTX 5080 build with the right wattage, efficiency, and connector support. The RTX 5080 is a 320W part.

item.title: Best CPU Cooler for Ryzen 7 7800X3D: Quiet and Efficient Picks
item.description: Compare the best CPU cooler options for the Ryzen 7 7800X3D, with a focus on thermals, noise, and value. See the test results to understand the real-world impact.

item.title: Best SSD for Gaming in 2026: What Actually Matters
item.description: Find the best SSD for gaming in 2026 by focusing on speed, capacity, longevity, and value instead of marketing claims. Here is my honest experience and what you actually need.

item.title: How to Build a Quiet Gaming Rig Without Giving Up Performance
item.description: A practical guide to reducing noise in a gaming PC while keeping frame rates and cooling performance strong. My last gaming PC sounded like a kitchen appliance.

item.title: How to Spot Fake or Misleading Hardware Reviews
item.description: Learn how to separate useful hardware testing from marketing language, cherry-picked benchmarks, and weak comparisons.

item.title: How to Choose a Good SSD for Video Editing
item.description: Understand what matters most for video editing storage, including throughput, capacity, and endurance. Here is my honest experience and what you actually need.

item.title: What to Do When Your PC Overheats
item.description: A practical checklist for identifying overheating causes and reducing heat before it leads to instability or damage. See the test results to understand the real-world impact.

item.title: How to Upgrade Your Wi-Fi Setup Without Replacing Everything
item.description: Improve your home network with targeted upgrades such as placement, channels, and a better access point instead of replacing your whole setup.

item.title: How to Clean Your PC Case Ventilation Properly
item.description: A simple cleaning routine can restore airflow, lower temperatures, and reduce noise in a system that has been running for months.

item.title: When It Is Time to Replace a Monitor
item.description: A monitor can become the limiting factor in your setup long before the rest of the hardware does. My previous monitor did not break.

item.title: How to Improve Laptop Battery Life Without Sacrificing Comfort
item.description: Small changes to settings and habits can extend laptop battery life without making the machine feel slower or harder to use. Here is exactly what you need to know to fix it.

item.title: Why Network Cables Still Matter in a Wireless World
item.description: A wired connection can still be the best option for reliability, latency, and consistency in a modern home setup.

item.title: How to Choose the Best Wi-Fi Router for Your Home
item.description: Learn how to compare coverage, speed, and reliability when choosing a router that fits your home and usage.

item.title: When to Replace a Power Supply Instead of Troubleshooting It
item.description: Know when a failing PSU is better replaced than repaired or endlessly tested. I spent three weeks troubleshooting a system that would randomly restart under load.

item.title: How to Choose a Monitor Arm and Stand
item.description: Learn how to pick the right monitor mount for ergonomics, desk space, and long-term flexibility. My desk used to be a mess of wasted space.

item.title: The Difference Between Air Cooling and Liquid Cooling
item.description: Understand the practical tradeoffs between air coolers and liquid cooling systems before choosing one for your build. See the test results to understand the real-world impact.

item.title: How to Debug a PC That Randomly Reboots
item.description: A practical checklist for identifying whether random restarts come from overheating, unstable power, or software issues.

item.title: How to Build a Budget Gaming PC That Still Feels Fast
item.description: Learn how to target the right parts for a budget gaming build that delivers strong value instead of weak compromises. Review the benchmark data to make an informed decision.

item.title: Signs Your Motherboard May Be Failing
item.description: Recognize early warning signs of motherboard trouble before a small issue becomes a costly repair.

item.title: How to Choose the Right PC Case
item.description: A practical guide to case size, airflow, expansion options, and build quality when choosing a home for your components. See the test results to understand the real-world impact.

item.title: How to Tell If Your CPU Cooler Is Working Well
item.description: Learn how to spot thermal issues, fan problems, and poor mounting that can affect your CPU's long-term stability. See the test results to understand the real-world impact.

item.title: What to Look for in a Midrange Monitor
item.description: A practical guide to choosing a monitor that balances image quality, refresh rate, and value without paying flagship prices. Here is my honest experience and what you actually need.

item.title: How to Set Up a Home Office PC for Productivity
item.description: Create a workspace that supports focus, comfort, and reliable performance for work, study, and everyday computing.

item.title: The Best Way to Plan a PC Upgrade Cycle
item.description: A simple upgrade plan helps you improve your system steadily instead of overspending on parts that do not matter yet. Review the benchmark data to make an informed decision.

item.title: Why Upgrading Storage Alone Does Not Make Everything Faster
item.description: A realistic explanation of how storage upgrades improve some tasks while leaving CPU, memory, and GPU bottlenecks intact. A few years ago I helped a friend upgrade his PC.

item.title: Why SSD Health Monitoring Matters More Than You Think
item.description: Understand why tracking SSD health can prevent data loss and help you decide when a drive is becoming a risk. I lost a drive without warning once.

item.title: Should You Buy an SSD or HDD for Game Storage
item.description: A direct comparison of SSD and HDD storage for gamers who want faster load times without overspending on capacity. Here is my honest experience and what you actually need.

item.title: How to Fix 'No Bootable Device Found' After Installing a New NVMe SSD
item.description: Fix 'No Bootable Device Found' after adding an NVMe SSD with BIOS, boot order, UEFI, and drive detection steps.

item.title: How to Reduce PC Noise Without Sacrificing Cooling
item.description: A practical look at fan tuning, airflow planning, and component selection for quieter builds that still stay cool. My desk sits about two feet from my PC tower.

item.title: How to Choose a Monitor for Gaming and Work Without Overpaying
item.description: A practical guide to monitor selection that balances refresh rate, resolution, panel quality, and ergonomics. Here is my honest experience and what you actually need.

item.title: When to Upgrade Your GPU Instead of Your CPU
item.description: A direct guide to deciding whether a gaming or productivity system would benefit more from a GPU upgrade or a CPU upgrade. Review the benchmark data to make an informed decision.

item.title: SSD vs HDD Boot Speed: What Actually Changes in Real Use
item.description: Compare SSD and HDD boot times, latency, and real-world system responsiveness with practical advice for PC builders. Here is my honest experience and what you actually need.

item.title: How to Upgrade Your Laptop Without Buying a New One
item.description: Learn which laptop upgrades are worth it and where the limits are when trying to extend the life of a portable machine. Here is exactly what you need to know to fix it.

item.title: How to Clean a PC Without Damaging the Components
item.description: A careful guide to dust removal and maintenance that avoids damaging fans, heatsinks, or delicate connectors.

item.title: Why Case Airflow Matters More Than People Think
item.description: A detailed explanation of why case airflow shapes thermals, noise levels, and long-term system stability. See the test results to understand the real-world impact.

item.title: How to Test a Power Supply Without Expensive Tools
item.description: A practical guide to evaluating a PSU using basic checks, visual inspection, and a careful test approach. See the test results to understand the real-world impact.

item.title: How to Choose the Right PSU for Your Build
item.description: Understand wattage, efficiency, connectors, and quality when selecting a power supply that will be reliable for years. See the test results to understand the real-world impact.

item.title: How to Choose an SSD for a Laptop or Desktop Without Overbuying
item.description: A practical comparison of SSD form factors, interface options, and capacity planning for laptops and desktops. Here is my honest experience and what you actually need.

item.title: The BIOS Settings That Matter Most for a Stable Overclock
item.description: Learn the BIOS settings that affect CPU voltage, memory stability, and safe overclock tuning without guesswork.

item.title: Why CPU Cooling Still Matters More Than People Pretend
item.description: A practical look at why cooling quality still shapes thermals, noise, longevity, and sustained performance in modern PCs. See the test results to understand the real-world impact.

item.title: How to Spot a Failing Hard Drive Before It Fails
item.description: A straightforward guide to warning signs, diagnostics, and backup habits that help you catch hard drive issues early. Here is my honest experience and what you actually need.

item.title: How to Keep a PC Running Well for Years
item.description: A simple maintenance routine can preserve performance, reduce failures, and extend the useful life of a desktop or laptop.

item.title: Why Your PC Feels Slow Even When It Has Good Specs
item.description: A fast CPU and plenty of RAM do not guarantee a smooth experience if storage, thermals, and background processes are working against you.

item.title: The Best Way to Organize Your Game Library on an SSD
item.description: A practical approach to keeping a game library tidy, fast, and easy to manage across one or more drives. I have about 200 games in my Steam library.

item.title: How to Read a PSU Spec Sheet Without Getting Misled
item.description: Learn how to read PSU wattage, 80 Plus ratings, ripple, protections, and quality signs without falling for marketing noise.

item.title: What to Check First When a PC Won't Boot
item.description: A clear troubleshooting guide for boot failures that focuses on the most common causes before deeper diagnostics.

item.title: How to Spot a Good Used GPU Deal
item.description: Use these practical checks to tell the difference between a smart used graphics card purchase and a risky one.

item.title: How to Choose a Motherboard for a New PC Build Without Overpaying
item.description: Learn what matters most when selecting a motherboard for a new build, from chipset and VRM quality to expansion and future-proofing.

item.title: Why RAM Speed Matters Less Than People Think
item.description: An honest look at RAM speed, capacity, and latency, with guidance on what actually affects everyday performance. Review the benchmark data to make an informed decision.

item.title: How to Choose the Right Case Fan Setup
item.description: Learn how to balance airflow, noise, and aesthetics when choosing intake and exhaust fans for your PC case. See the test results to understand the real-world impact.

item.title: How to Choose the Right CPU Cooler for Your Build
item.description: A practical guide to selecting a CPU cooler based on thermal demands, case compatibility, and noise tolerance. I have made nearly every cooler mistake possible over the years.

item.title: How to Build a Silent PC Without Sacrificing Performance
item.description: Learn how to cut noise in a modern PC build with airflow planning, fan tuning, and component choices that still keep performance high.

item.title: Windows 11 Setup Tips That Make a PC Feel Faster
item.description: A focused guide to system settings and habits that improve perceived speed on Windows 11 without invasive changes. Here is exactly what you need to know to fix it.

item.title: What Actually Matters in a Gaming PC Build
item.description: Cut through the marketing and learn which gaming PC components actually affect frame rates, smoothness, and upgrade value. Review the benchmark data to make an informed decision.

item.title: How to Spot a Bad Power Supply Before You Buy It
item.description: A practical checklist for evaluating power supplies by efficiency, protection features, and build quality rather than brand hype. I've killed a GPU.

item.title: How to Install Windows from a USB Drive Without Making a Mess of It
item.description: A practical guide to creating a Windows installer USB and installing the OS cleanly without the usual setup headaches. Here is exactly what you need to know to fix it.

item.title: The Best Way to Upgrade a PC Without Replacing Everything
item.description: Learn how to upgrade a PC intelligently by targeting the components that actually improve speed, stability, and value. The best upgrade I ever made to a PC cost $65.

item.title: BIOS Tuning Basics for Stable Overnight Overclocking
item.description: A grounded guide to BIOS tuning that focuses on voltage, memory stability, and temperature monitoring instead of risky shortcuts.

item.title: Why Your PC Feels Slow Even When the CPU Is Fast
item.description: A practical breakdown of why modern PCs feel laggy, including storage bottlenecks, thermal throttling, background services, and memory pressure.

item.title: How to Diagnose a Random PC Reboot Without Losing Your Mind
item.description: A hands-on guide to finding the cause of random reboots, from overheating and unstable power to driver and BIOS issues.

item.title: How to Choose the Right SSD for Your PC Without Paying for the Wrong Specs
item.description: A practical guide to choosing the right SSD for gaming, work, and general use by focusing on interface, capacity, and endurance rather than hype.
